A '''battle''' at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] occurred during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. As the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] continued to expand their control of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], Commenor suffered severe orbital bombardment by Yuuzhan Vong forces. This attack occurred as a similar Yuuzhan Vong [[Attack on Kuat|attack]] on [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], which left the planet similarly damaged.<ref name="TUF" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
